entries.speaker: Jeremy Allaire
entries.quote: The agentic economy is being born as we speak.
entries.quoteZh: 所谓的 agentic economy，正在此刻成形。

entries.speaker: Jeremy Allaire
entries.quote: Stablecoins are the native money layer of the internet.
entries.quoteZh: 稳定币是互联网原生的货币层。

entries.speaker: Claude
entries.quote: In Cowork, Claude can now build live artifacts: dashboards and trackers connected to your apps and files.
entries.quoteZh: 在 Cowork 里，Claude 现在能直接生成 live artifacts，例如连接应用和文件的仪表盘与追踪器。

entries.speaker: Sam Altman
entries.quote: The internal working name for this was "telepathy", and it feels like it.
entries.quoteZh: 这个能力的内部代号叫 telepathy，而且它真的有那种感觉。
